creator: ian@FreeBSD.org
text:
This looks good to me (at least by eye, I don't have an rpi 3b+ for testing).  I think it's probably ready to be committed.

As to the issue about finding the right device in the FDT data, from comment #4, I think that is beyond the scope of the change in this PR, and I'm working on a solution to that separately (it applies to other devices too, such as if_smsc used in rpi1/2 models).
